tasks.title: Implement GCP CSPM Resource Scanner (MVP)
tasks.prompt: Implement the MVP version of the GCP CSPM Resource Scanner in Go, following the architectural patterns established in src/scanner/providers/aws.go. Ensure the design aligns with the system architecture in docs/architecture/system-design-v1.md and covers the resource types prioritized in the CSPM PRD. Include comments and TODOs for areas requiring further iteration.

tasks.title: Implement Policy Engine Core Logic
tasks.prompt: Write the initial Go implementation of the Policy Engine core logic, using the schema defined in src/policy/schema.yaml and the system design in docs/architecture/system-design-v1.md. The engine should be able to parse policy definitions and evaluate them against resource data. Focus on modularity and extensibility for future cloud providers.

tasks.title: Integrate JWT-based Auth with Policy Engine Endpoints
tasks.prompt: Create a Go HTTP handler for the Policy Engine that integrates JWT-based authentication and authorization as implemented in src/auth/handler.go. Ensure endpoints enforce RBAC as described in docs/architecture/auth-design-v1.md. The handler should expose endpoints to evaluate policies and return results securely.

tasks.title: Security Review: Policy Engine Core & Auth Integration
tasks.prompt: Perform a security review of the Policy Engine core logic and its HTTP handler with JWT-based authentication. Assess input validation, RBAC enforcement, and adherence to API security requirements. Identify risks, recommend mitigations, and summarize findings in a structured format.

tasks.title: Test Plan: GCP Scanner & Policy Engine
tasks.prompt: Develop a comprehensive test plan for the new GCP CSPM Resource Scanner and the Policy Engine, including their integration points. Cover functional, edge case, and security scenarios, referencing the overall test strategy. Include test data requirements and outline manual vs. automated coverage.

tasks.title: Compliance Mapping: GCP Scanner & Policy Engine
tasks.prompt: Map the GCP CSPM Scanner and Policy Engine core logic to the SOC2 and HIPAA requirements in the compliance matrix. Identify which controls are addressed, what evidence is generated, and note any compliance gaps. Provide recommendations for future iterations.

tasks.title: Dashboard Widget: Policy Evaluation Results
tasks.prompt: Design and implement a React component for the dashboard that displays policy evaluation results returned by the Policy Engine handler. Follow the dashboard information architecture and wireframes. Ensure the component supports different result states (pass, fail, error) and is accessible.

tasks.title: Update CI/CD Pipeline for GCP Scanner & Policy Engine
tasks.prompt: Extend the CI/CD pipeline to build, test, and deploy the GCP CSPM Scanner and Policy Engine components. Ensure the pipeline includes static analysis, unit tests, and artifact publishing as described in the pipeline design document.
